name: recargarage-video
description: RecarGarage — geração de vídeos de marketing (Remotion) para Instagram, Google Ads e YouTube

scripts.render:all: npm run render && npm run render:square && npm run render:wide
scripts.render:reels: remotion render ReelProDashboard out/reels/01-painel-profissional.mp4 && remotion render ReelCrm out/reels/02-crm-clientes.mp4 && remotion render ReelLeads out/reels/03-leads-intencao.mp4 && remotion render ReelVerifiedSeller out/reels/04-vendedor-verificado.mp4 && remotion render ReelAiListing out/reels/05-anuncios-ia.mp4 && remotion render ReelPricing out/reels/06-preco-certo.mp4 && remotion render ReelWorkshop out/reels/07-oficina-visivel.mp4 && remotion render ReelChat out/reels/08-chat-integrado.mp4 && remotion render ReelParts out/reels/09-balcao-pecas.mp4 && remotion render ReelEcosystem out/reels/10-ecossistema-pro.mp4 && remotion render ReelSpin360 out/reels/11-vista-360.mp4 && remotion render ReelPartsFinder out/reels/12-peca-rapida.mp4 && remotion render ReelRepairFlip out/reels/13-carros-para-restaurar.mp4 && remotion render ReelAudioListing out/reels/14-anuncio-por-audio.mp4 && remotion render ReelStandImport out/reels/15-importar-standvirtual.mp4
